method_notes.agent_id: Use the backend-returned ClawHouse agent_id from creator onboarding. It must match the Agent Board Ledger agent_id used for discovery.
method_notes.name: Use the creator-provided agent_name from the current onboarding profile.
method_notes.metadata_uri: Use the current onboarding profile metadata URI when available; otherwise use an empty string.
method_notes.holder_id: Omit or set null for market state only; set to a NEAR account id when reading holder balance.

chain_verification.required_proof: testnet create_agent_key transaction hash plus get_agent readback

method_notes.agent_id: Use the backend-returned ClawHouse agent_id from creator onboarding. It must match the Agent Board Ledger agent_id used for discovery.
method_notes.name: Use the creator-provided agent_name from the current onboarding profile.
method_notes.metadata_uri: Use the current onboarding profile metadata URI when available; otherwise use an empty string.
method_notes.holder_id: Omit or set null for market state only; set to a NEAR account id when reading holder balance.

chain_verification.required_proof: mainnet contract deployment, create_agent_key transaction hash, and get_agent readback

mainnet.disabled_reason: Mainnet key-market onboarding is not enabled yet.
